news.title: Investors See Lower Chance of Rate Hikes After Jobs Data
news.summary: Softer-than-expected June hiring data has prompted investors to readjust their expectations for an interest-rate rise by the Fed.    They now put the odds of a July hike at roughly 20%, down from about 30% before the report, according to CME Group.

news.title: Will Oil Prices Keep Falling? WTI Futures Hit Pre-Iran War Lows
news.summary: Crude oil prices tracked toward a fourth week of declines after slipping Thursday morning. WTI futures hit their lowest levels since prior to the U.S.-Iran war.
